creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
The reason for this: it is more work for me to review your patch and then check everything again than to just write the patch myself.  Also, your patch misses a bunch of things that need to be changed (same as with your initial port, which shipped a defective rp script).  I am in direct contact with upstream and have in fact been asked by them to create this port. 

I'll push an update once I'm done adapting the port to some upstream changes, including unbundling liboqs.
